paymentMethods.name: Zelle
paymentMethods.instructions: Please send your payment to pay@biolongevitylabs.com via Zelle. Include your order number in the memo field.

paymentMethods.name: Venmo
paymentMethods.instructions: Send payment to Venmo username: @BioLongevityLabs. Please include your order ID.

paymentMethods.name: Cash App
paymentMethods.instructions: Send payment to Cashtag: $BioLongevityLabs. Include your order number.

paymentMethods.name: Check / Money Order
paymentMethods.instructions: Make checks payable to BioLongevity Labs LLC. Mail to: F2 Nutrition Inc. 405 Rothrock Rd #106 Akron, OH 44321.
